modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to log into Cisco AnyConnect VPN.

full_description_text: The user is experiencing issues logging into the VPN. They receive an error message stating "VPN: Login failed." This problem is preventing them from accessing necessary resources remotely.
short_description: Unable to log into Cisco AnyConnect VPN.
description: The user is experiencing issues logging into the VPN. They receive an error message stating "VPN: Login failed." This problem is preventing them from accessing necessary resources remotely.
